title: UpdateFunctionCodeRequest
description: Request body for updating a function's code

ZipFile.description: Base64-encoded contents of the deployment package. AWS SDK and CLI clients handle encoding automatically.

S3Bucket.description: An S3 bucket in the same AWS Region as the function

S3Key.description: The S3 key of the deployment package

S3ObjectVersion.description: For versioned S3 objects, the version of the deployment package

ImageUri.description: URI of a container image in Amazon ECR

Publish.description: Set to true to publish a new version of the function after updating the code

DryRun.description: Set to true to validate the request without updating the code

RevisionId.description: Update only if the revision ID matches
